Effect version: 3.19.19

/.src/multipleEffectProvide_effectFnRegular.ts(19,3): warning TS377033: This expression chains multiple `Effect.provide` calls. Providing Layers in multiple calls in a chain can break service lifecycle behavior compared with a single combined provide with merged layers. effect(multipleEffectProvide)
/.src/multipleEffectProvide_effectFnRegular.ts(25,3): warning TS377033: This expression chains multiple `Effect.provide` calls. Providing Layers in multiple calls in a chain can break service lifecycle behavior compared with a single combined provide with merged layers. effect(multipleEffectProvide)
/.src/multipleEffectProvide_effectFnRegular.ts(31,3): warning TS377033: This expression chains multiple `Effect.provide` calls. Providing Layers in multiple calls in a chain can break service lifecycle behavior compared with a single combined provide with merged layers. effect(multipleEffectProvide)


==== /.src/multipleEffectProvide_effectFnRegular.ts (3 errors) ====
    // @effect-v3
    import * as Effect from "effect/Effect"
    
    class MyService1 extends Effect.Service<MyService1>()("MyService1", {
      succeed: { value: 1 }
    }) {}
    
    class MyService2 extends Effect.Service<MyService2>()("MyService2", {
      succeed: { value: 2 }
    }) {}
    
    class MyService3 extends Effect.Service<MyService3>()("MyService3", {
      succeed: { value: 3 }
    }) {}
    
    // Effect.fn with regular (non-generator) function and multiple provide calls
    export const shouldReportEffectFnRegular = Effect.fn(
      () => Effect.void,
      Effect.provide(MyService1.Default),
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377033: This expression chains multiple `Effect.provide` calls. Providing Layers in multiple calls in a chain can break service lifecycle behavior compared with a single combined provide with merged layers. effect(multipleEffectProvide)
      Effect.provide(MyService2.Default)
    )
    
    export const shouldReportEffectFnRegularTraced = Effect.fn("traced")(
      () => Effect.void,
      Effect.provide(MyService1.Default),
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377033: This expression chains multiple `Effect.provide` calls. Providing Layers in multiple calls in a chain can break service lifecycle behavior compared with a single combined provide with merged layers. effect(multipleEffectProvide)
      Effect.provide(MyService2.Default)
    )
    
    export const shouldReportThreeProvidesRegular = Effect.fn(
      () => Effect.void,
      Effect.provide(MyService1.Default),
      ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
!!! warning TS377033: This expression chains multiple `Effect.provide` calls. Providing Layers in multiple calls in a chain can break service lifecycle behavior compared with a single combined provide with merged layers. effect(multipleEffectProvide)
      Effect.provide(MyService2.Default),
      Effect.provide(MyService3.Default)
    )
